detectors.description:
ClicksYieldRouter.getMorphoAPY() (contracts/ClicksYieldRouter.sol#262-278) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- utilization = (uint256(mkt.totalBorrowAssets) * 1e18) / mkt.totalSupplyAssets (contracts/ClicksYieldRouter.sol#273)
	- apyBps = (utilization * 1500) / 1e18 (contracts/ClicksYieldRouter.sol#277)
